message:
🐛 fix: handle notifications/initialized in MCP handshake (#26)

Claude Code sends "notifications/initialized" (the full MCP method name)
after the initialize handshake. Both MCP servers were returning -32601
"Method not found" for this notification, causing Claude Code to mark
them as failed.

The ops server handled the short form "initialized" but not the full
method name. The deploy server handled neither form.

Fixes #25

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
